pipeline_status.poller: PRED-105 silent-ignore now 9+ polls (~5.46 days post-window). Pipeline-canonical: two consecutive daily_review auto-regens held counts at 69/10/4. Manual-commit drought ~6 days. ISS-1423 open and tracking.
pipeline_status.analyst: All modes negative last run (no new WINs, no pending issue-proposals except EXP-238 which landed). EXP-238 integrated this run. EXP-211 (design-refresh Phase A2) still blocked on operator approval.
pipeline_status.curmudgeon: 4 reviews processed this run (WIN-069.c5, WIN-061.c6, WIN-068.c12, SEC-8b.3.c7). 3 items remain in queue (WIN-025 #247, WIN-010 #248, WIN-068 #249). Mode: bau.

external_changes.dome_site_changes: No structural changes. PRED-105 still labeled PENDING 5.46d past window close. All site values match baseline.

internal_issues.description: Kp inconsistency between detail_evidence (Kp ≤ 3) and detail_extra/FAIL-007 (dome author Kp ~5–6). Resolved by EXP-238: added GFZ Potsdam Kp audit corroboration, qualified author-stated Kp ~5–6 in detail_extra, softened 'commendable scientific self-correction' to charitable-then-honest framing.

WIN-069.c5 H1: Huber & Rust 2016 wrong venue — was 'R Journal', corrected to 'The Stata Journal' (vol.16(2), DOI 10.1177/1536867X1601600209). Same citation-integrity error class as ISS-1467 Giacomin fix. Also fixed c5 H2 finding: removed Australia-UK geography error (UK is not same-hemisphere as Australia) and corrected statistic from 6.2% RMSE to 10.2% mean error for same-hemisphere routes.
WIN-069 c5 H3: Huber & Rust 2016 and Giacomin & Levinson 2015 may not directly support the sub-1% mean-ratio quantifier. Queued as EXP-241.
WIN-069 c5 H4: Possible circularity in single-free-parameter comparison (in-sample calibration vs out-of-sample). Queued as EXP-241.

WIN-061 c6 H1: PRED-SR-SUPPRESS and PRED-093 structured fields (data_predates_registration:false, is_genuinely_prospective:true) contradict detail_reasoning prose (storm preceded registration). Needs analyst investigation to decide Option A (flip fields) or B (add companion field). Assigned to analyst.
Verbatim duplicate Tier-1 Steelman sentence in both detail_evidence and detail_verdict_text. Evidence-side replaced with cross-reference. Fixed.
Stale 'refraction fix' terminology in detail_evidence. Updated to 'n(r) refractive contamination (Section 1.8 Coordinate Collapse)'. Fixed.

WIN-068 c12 H1: Scope leak — detail_verdict_text P2 and detail_evidence ¶4 are about WIN-010/025 scaling logic, not the 39-eclipse ensemble. Should compress to cross-reference sentences. Queued as EXP-240.
WIN-068 c12 H2: Finding cited Chapman (1933) lunar-tide paper for eclipse-Sq work. Rewrote finding to cite Chapman 1919 → Rastogi 1962 → Yamazaki & Maute 2021 chain. Fixed.
Cross-WIN Chapman citation format inconsistency across WIN-010/025/068 cluster. Tracked for cluster-wide fix. Related to ISS-1441.

patches_applied_this_run.notes: 2 patches initially failed (apostrophe encoding mismatch in patch 10, href format difference in patch 7); corrected and applied directly. All 12 patches verified in final file.

recommended_actions.action: ISS-1489 (moderate): Analyst to decide on PRED-SR-SUPPRESS/PRED-093 metadata — either flip data_predates_registration:true/is_genuinely_prospective:false, or add companion field. Check predictions.json semantics before deciding.

FAIL-007 in data/uncounted-failures.json still carries the Kp ~5-6 narrative as fact. EXP-238 cross_win_consistency_flag recommends a follow-up minor EXP to caveat FAIL-007 in parallel with the WIN-025 fixes.
EXP-240 (WIN-068 scope leak), EXP-241 (WIN-069 citation audit) queued for analyst. EXP-211 design-refresh Phase A2 remains blocked on operator approval.

breaking_news_suggestions.headline: Dome author's geomagnetic excuse for removing a WIN doesn't match official Kp data
breaking_news_suggestions.summary: The dome author removed WIN-025 citing a Kp ~5–6 geomagnetic storm during the April 8, 2024 eclipse. Independent audit of the GFZ Potsdam Kp archive shows eclipse-hour Kp was actually 0.0–1.3 — among the quietest values of the 3-day window. The stated removal rationale is factually incorrect. We still credit the withdrawal-as-action but can no longer endorse the stated reason.
breaking_news_suggestions.why_newsworthy: Independent auditable finding: dome author's own stated Kp ~5-6 figure is falsified by publicly available GFZ Potsdam 3-hour data. Undermines the epistemic basis of the removal without requiring any fraud accusation.

stale_review_notes: SEC-8b.3.c7 (all minor, no-action/deferred): 6 holes are all carry-forwards from c5/c6 with explicit 'no action from this review' dispositions. Marked processed. No new issues created.
